description:
Implement delivery.mode="deferred" in .balls/config.json. When set, bl review on a task:
1. Commits uncommitted worktree changes (unchanged from today).
2. Pushes work/bl-xxxx to origin (the configured remote).
3. Auto-creates a child gate task — "Forge: PR merged for bl-xxxx" — and links the parent via `bl link add <parent> gates <child>`. The link type "gates" already exists and is enforced on close.
4. Flips status to review on the state branch.
5. Does NOT squash-merge into target_branch. Does NOT set delivered_in. Does NOT touch the integration branch at all.
6. Prints a PR title hint that includes [bl-xxxx] so the operator (human or forge plugin) preserves the delivery tag in the forge-produced commit.

WHY: external review needs the work branch alive on origin and the integration branch untouched until the forge produces the merge commit. The auto-gate is what makes this BC-safe: old bl clients refuse to close a task with an open gates link, so even an old client that never heard of deferred mode cannot tear down the worktree mid-review. This reuses an existing primitive instead of inventing a new lifecycle state.

The auto-gate child should carry a tag (e.g. "forge-gate") so it is filterable in bl ready and bl list. It should NOT be claimable in the normal sense — closing it is the forge plugin's job (or a human running bl close on it after merging the PR by hand). We rely on the existing "do not claim a task that is the target of an open gates link" guidance in SKILL.md to keep agents off it.

ACCEPTANCE:
- mode=local-squash (default): all existing tests pass; behavior bit-identical to today.
- mode=deferred: bl review pushes work branch, creates gate child, sets status=review, leaves target_branch untouched.
- bl close on the parent fails with the existing gates-blocked error until the gate child closes.
- bl close on the gate child carries the forge merge SHA in its message (or via --delivered flag on the gate close), so the parent's subsequent close can opportunistically resolve delivered_in.
- Old bl client running bl close on a deferred-mode parent is correctly refused by the gates check (no special code in the old client — this is the BC win).
title: Deferred-squash review mode: push branch, auto-open gate
